working_on: Phase 1.2 rendering policy (AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md + ADR 0027) plus three sibling commitments from exploration: ADR 0028 input-side scope policy (output-side rendering's structural complement), ADR 0029 personal financial cost ceiling (operating constraint protecting builder from uncapped marginal cost), and four tension entries (OQ-BYOK-REGIME, OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR, OQ-CONTEXT-COMPRESSION, OQ-PEDAGOGY-INFERENCE-LOCUS) plus pedagogy-inference registry stub. Per the no-silent-drops feedback rule, all four exploration topics land as artifacts in this session.
outcome_summary: Phase 1.2 closed. Authored AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md (production-quality rendering-policy contract; ships verbatim as Sonnet system prompt at Phase 7; eight sections including forbidden-token enumeration with per-category ADR rationale, scope discipline, tension-emission policy, gradeable worked example). Authored three ADRs: 0027 (rendering policy as prompt-layer contract; asymmetric-amendment discipline), 0028 (input-side scope structural-not-prompt; bidirectional contract pair with 0027; exit affordance as UI primitive; architectural-constraint-beats-prompt-guardrail principle generalized), 0029 (personal financial cost ceiling as operating constraint; cost protection as precondition not feature; soft-walls-degrade-don't-terminate principle; ceiling value held privately). Added four tension entries (OQ-BYOK-REGIME institutional-vs-consumer, OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR degradation ladder, OQ-CONTEXT-COMPRESSION token-amplification mitigation, OQ-PEDAGOGY-INFERENCE-LOCUS rule-layer revisit). Created docs/pedagogy/inferences.md registry stub seeding ~19 inferences across six categories. Substantial revisions to business.md (Personal Financial Risk Ceiling section, Cost Amplification subsection, Revenue Mechanisms reframed by learning intensity), pedagogy.md (Layered Instruction Architecture table revised for API-app architecture), MISSION.md (commitment 2 inline cross-link to ADR 0029), ROADMAP.md (Phase 1.2 expansion + Phase 7/8/9 success-criteria additions), CROSS_REFERENCES.md (3 new shared-capability entries + 3 new phase-boundary checks), adr/README.md (Phase 1 index extended). ADR collection grows from 26 to 29. tools/validate.py clean (0 hard fails, 0 soft warns). Phase 1.3 (confidence_level column on node schema) is the remaining Phase 1 work item; assigned to S-0009.
